verdict: 2026-07-12 14:29 PDT — Sound and idiomatic. I would build this as implemented: pure deletion of the disproven pagehide instrumentation, its effects and dedicated tests, plus declarative documentation/backlog reconciliation. No replacement abstraction or dependency is warranted. No removed symbols remain under client/src, and no dependency was added. I could not independently rerun the gate because the read-only sandbox prevented Vite from creating client/node_modules/.vite-temp; this is an environment limitation, not an approach finding.
